summary.para: Indicates whether the current cluster state is included in the snapshot.
The name of the repository that includes the snapshot.
Statistics for the shards in the snapshot.

item.para: FAILED: The snapshot finished with an error and failed to store any data.
STARTED: The snapshot is currently running.

summary.para: Details about the number (file_count) and size (size_in_bytes) of files included in the snapshot.
The universally unique identifier (UUID) for the snapshot.
